column1: Hey Mallory, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you! which destination were you lookin to book
Worddd Cabo is a vibe for sure. a little more on the pricey side but its a vibe
how many ppl in your group so far?
It just me and a friend rn
we got a few other Arizona State groups rollin with us. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Asap like within the nexts 2 weeks or so
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
I'm otw to waste management rn but I will respond to it later today!
When I went last year our plan had open bars at the clubs included
And h need the 200$ deposit tomorrow right?
Yeee just to get things secured then you can pay the majority off later next week
I will text u later tn
The link for the 4 days quote is not working for some reason
Ah sorry! lets see whats up
I can put the down payment down tomorrow
Just wanna make sure that the party pass or whatever that gives us the open bar at the clubs is included
okay bet. and the party pass comes with open bar yup! the party pass is an additional add on tho, not included in the base price
the options are Squid Roe, Mandala, La Vaquita, and our open bar Booze Cruise event
Yea we're down to add that for 2 people
okay bet lets do it. 4 night stay + 3 night party pass & booze cruise?
aight bet ill send you the reservation in the morning
What days would be able to book specifically
yea honestly we can do any start date
any specific reason for wanting the weekend?
assuming to be able to go out?
hey which day did we want to start the trip?
Ok so we changed our mind and want to do the 5 days at the riu Santa Fe
The links u sent me worked
Okay dope. I can set up the reservation for you. which dates did we want to do
And we'd want to be there on the weekend so 12-16
bet lemme just make sure we have that available
were y'all lookin to get started today if so?
word just got the green light. will make the reservation now and send over
So with the party pass and deposit I'd be like 1500 each right?
just wanted to double confirm, are you both 21? or atleast one of you
just emailed that over lmk if it came through
Cool. The 200 each person takes out of the originally 1500 right
yea so the balance will be 1299
hey when you have a min if you could upload your flights, so we can set up your airport transfers!
Ok me and my friend should have put both ours in
My friend get there about and hour and a half earlier than me but she wants to wait till I land and get on a shuttle together
I personally dont recommend waiting tbh
customs / immigration line can be super long
and then in the exit lobby theres not much of a waiting area
That's what I tried to tell her lol. But she'll go separate it's all good
she can just wait for you at the resort in the lobby!
but if she really wants she can ask the transportation team when she gets there, if she can wait
Yea she'll be good she says she'll be fine taking the shuttle earlier
I looked on our account but it doesn't give specific dates for bruise Cruze and open bar clubs for each day either
R u able to tell me a schedule for all ?
Hey so we got our hotel but no one gave us a schedule for the party pass at all

Sup Mallory, thanks for the patience and glad you made it safely. I sent an email with a breakdown on the party pass schedule and how things work sometime last week. title should be 'cabo pre-departure info'

have you gotten to see any Go Blue Tours staff in the lobby since you've arrived? they'll help you with the tickets to everything you need. if not they will be there in the am in the lobby. I'll let you know the exact time asap

for the party pass schedule, Mandala Nightclub is the 12th, and then Squid Roe you can go to any other night of the week, you have two tickets there, super dope spot. our onsite staff will explain more in detail as well
